programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Madrid Jumping - Round 1 - Competition Team
programme.desc: The 2026 Madrid round takes place from 15–17 May at Club de Campo Villa de Madrid, as part of the elite global show jumping circuit. The event features three days of top-level CSI5* action, highlighted by the LGCT Grand Prix of Madrid on Sunday, where leading riders and horses compete for key championship points.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Shanghai Jumping - Round 1 Competition Team
programme.desc: Held at the Shanghai Juss International Equestrian Centre, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. The schedule includes the Global Champions League team competition and the Grand Prix, with riders earning points toward the season standings. Technical courses emphasize combinations and time allowed on a compact arena.

programme.desc: MotoGP heads to Thailand at the Chang International Circuit in Buriram, a track defined by long straights, heavy braking zones, and intense heat. The stop-start layout challenges tyre management and rider endurance, while strong acceleration out of slow corners is crucial. Local support and Honda’s home presence add extra intensity to this demandin

programme.title: Lens vs Nice - Coupe de France Final's 2025
programme.desc: Live and exclusive only on beIN, the Coupe de France, also referred to as the French Cup, is the premier knockout cup competition in French football organised by the French Football Federation (FF). The winner qualifies for the group stage of the UEFA Europa League and a place in the Trophée des Champions. Current champions are Paris saint Germain.

programme.title: Al Nassr (KSA) - Gamba Osaka (JPN) - AFC Champions League Two 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Two is the second-tier competition of Asian club football, ranked below the AFC Champions League Elite. Participation in the competition is open to clubs from the top 12 nations in the East and the West region based on the AFC club competitions ranking. All games are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Al-Ahli Saudi The Champions Of AFC CL Elite 2025/2026
programme.desc: Saudi club Al-Ahli FC secured their status as Asia’s top club by winning the 2025/2026 AFC Champions League Elite title, defeating Japan's Machida Zelvia 1-0 in the final on April 25, 2026, at King Abdullah Sports City Stadium in Jeddah. Al-Ahli FC became the first team to win back-to-back Asian titles since city rival Al Ittihad in 2005.

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Wimbledon - History - Coming of Age
programme.desc: Coming of Age explores the quintessential Wimbledon experience; it's great characters and champions. It traces how one tournament has been the catalyst for so much innovation in the game of tennis. The third in this four part series depicts how and why All England Lawn Tennis Club is one of the best in the world.

Played on outdoor grass courts, the tournament is one of the final stops before Wimbledon, giving players a key opportunity to sharpen their grass-court form, gain valuable match rhythm, and compete for a share of the €773,465 pri

programme.title: Nimes vs Limoges - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winn

programme.title: Sete vs Montpellier - Playoffs SF Leg 1 - Marmara Spike ligue Volleyball - 2026
programme.desc: France’s top men’s volleyball competition, the LNV Ligue A Masculine (Marmara SpikeLigue), delivers a season of elite clubs battling through a home-and-away league before the playoffs. Expect big serving, quick middle attacks, and high-level defense as teams chase points, seeding and the national title in a prime-time French showcase.

programme.title: Scotland vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Scotland and Morocco’s only previous encounter was in the group stages of the 1998 World Cup – Morocco won 3-0, their largest World Cup victory to date. Nine of Morocco’s last 12 World Cup matches have come against European teams. In fact, no side has played as many WC matches against European opposition since the 2018 tournament as Morocco.

programme.title: Türkiye vs Paraguay - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage

programme.desc: This will be Norway and Senegal’s first World Cup meeting. Their only previous encounter came in a March 2006 friendly in Dakar – Senegal won 2-1. programme.title: Scotland vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Scotland and Morocco’s only previous encounter was in the group stages of the 1998 World Cup – Morocco won 3-0, their largest World Cup victory to date.
